findings.message: Breaking schema change: field 'name' renamed to 'title' without backwards-compatible deprecation or alias. Existing GraphQL clients querying for 'name' will break.
findings.suggestion: Provide a deprecation path: keep 'name' as a deprecated field (using @strawberry.field with deprecation_reason), or add an alias to maintain backwards compatibility. Alternatively, use 'title' internally but provide a stable external field name.

findings.message: API divergence: mutation input parameter is 'name' but the output Item type now has 'title'. This creates an inconsistency between input and output schema, confusing GraphQL and REST API consumers.
findings.suggestion: Align the mutation input parameter with the renamed field. Change the parameter from 'name' to 'title' to maintain consistency with the output Item type.
